description: Adversaries may encrypt data on target systems or on large numbers of systems in a network to interrupt availability to system and network resources. Ransomware family BlackBasta is actively used against healthcare targets.
Attackers exploit the unpatched Exchange 2019 ProxyNotShell chain (CVE-2022-41040/41082) to gain a foothold on the perimeter mail server.
Adversaries may dump credentials from LSASS memory once local admin is obtained on the mail server, enabling lateral movement across the clinic's flat network.
